title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Flexspace Osprey LLP
body: "Application number 5111  Applicant Flexspace No2 LLP objected to the name used by Flexspace Osprey LLP under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 18 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Flexspace Osprey LLP is changed to OC450205, LTD. "
